title: VulnHunter-Fix per-finding triage sidecar
description: Schema for .work/<repo>/graph_context/<vuln>.json — the per-finding sidecar written by the executor (REQ-GRA-015, REQ-CWE-008). Workers read this instead of querying the graph directly. Non-crypto findings omit crypto_trust_chain.

confidence.description: high: graphifyy AST succeeded. low: grep fallback (REQ-GRA-006). Selects validator matching mode (REQ-GRA-020).

sink_symbol.description: The symbol at the vulnerable sink (e.g., 'auth/login.py:authenticate'). Null when the vulnerability is not symbol-anchored (e.g., pure config finding).

callers_of_sink.description: Output of graph.callers_of(sink_symbol) at sidecar-write time (REQ-GRA-008).

blast_radius.description: Files reachable from the vulnerable symbol via imports/depends_on (REQ-GRA-007). Optional; empty when graph is unavailable.

reachable_from_entry.description: Result of reachable_from(input_file, input_line, sink_symbol). Null when entry point is unknown.

graph_backend.description: Provenance of the sidecar data. Must be 'grep' whenever confidence=='low' and 'ast' whenever confidence=='high'.

graphifyy_version.description: Resolved graphifyy version at sidecar write time. Null in grep-fallback mode.

crypto_trust_chain.description: Populated only for findings routed to worker_agent_crypto.md (REQ-CWE-008). Mechanical outputs from the four checkers (REQ-CWE-009); never LLM-authored. All four booleans must be true for the worker to grant FULL tier (REQ-CWE-007).
